title: diabelia spathulata var. colorata
intro: Diabelia spathulata var. colorata, also known as the 'Pride of Rochester', is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its vibrant red stems and pink or white flowers. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Diabelia spathulata var. colorata include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Diabelia spathulata var. colorata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
